title: lantana somalensis
intro: Lantana somalensis is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, native to Somalia and parts of eastern Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lantana somalensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
